zh.lifeSummary: 當Arthur Plantagenet於1480年出生在法國阿奎泰道多卡拉斯時，他的父親Edward IV King of England38歲，母親Elizabeth Wayte35歲。他於大約1511年與Lady Elizabeth Grey結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他於1533年在法國皮卡迪卡拉斯被列為lord deputy of calais。他去世於1542年3月3日在英國倫敦享年62歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Arthur Plantagenet于1480年出生在法国阿奎泰道多卡拉斯时，他的父亲Edward IV King of England38岁，母亲Elizabeth Wayte35岁。他于大约1511年与Lady Elizabeth Grey结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他于1533年在法国皮卡迪卡拉斯被列为lord deputy of calais。他去世于1542年3月3日在英国倫敦享年62岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Arthur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin. King Arthur was a British king of the 5th or 6th century, about whom virtually no historical facts are known. He ruled in Britain after the collapse of the Roman Empire and before the coming of the Germanic tribes, and a vast body of legends grew up around him in the literatures of medieval Western Europe. His name is first found in the Latinized form Artorius; it is of obscure etymology. The spelling with -th- was popular among the gentry families of West Yorkshire in the late 1400s, even before Henry VII , who may have hoped to capitalize on the legend, gave the name to his son. It remained in regular use in some areas and its popularity exploded in the early 19th century, largely as a result of the fame of Arthur Wellesley ( 1769–1852 ), Duke of Wellington, the victor at the Battle of Waterloo and subsequently prime minister. Further influences were Tennyson's Idylls of the King ( 1859–85 ), and the widespread Victorian interest, especially among the Pre-Raphaelites, in things medieval in general and in Arthurian legend in particular.

en.lifeSummary: When Arthur Plantagenet was born in 1480, in Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, his father, Edward IV King of England, was 38 and his mother, Elizabeth Wayte, was 35. He married Lady Elizabeth Grey about 1511. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. In 1533, at the age of 53, his occupation is listed as lord deputy of calais in Calais, Picardie, France. He died on 3 March 1542, in London, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Tower of London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arthur Plantagenet est né en 1480, à Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, son père, Edward IV King of England, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wayte, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Grey environ 1511. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. En 1533, à l’âge de 53 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est lord deputy of calais à Calais, Picardie, France. Il est décédé le 3 mars 1542, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Arthur Plantagenet 1480 in Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward IV King of England 38 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Wayte 35. Er hat um 1511 Lady Elizabeth Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. 1533, als er 53 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als lord deputy of calais in Calais, Picardie, Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb am 3. März 1542 im Alter von 62 Jahren in London, England und wurde in Tower of London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Arthur Plantagenet è nato il nel 1480 nel Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Edward IV King of England, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Wayte, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Grey circa 1511. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Nel 1533, all'età di 53 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come lord deputy of calais nel Calais, Picardie, Francia. Morì il 3 marzo 1542, nel London, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Tower of London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Arthur Plantagenetが1480年にフランスアクイティアインドールドグンカレイスで生まれた時，父Edward IV King of Englandは38歳，母Elizabeth Wayteは35歳であった。約1511年にLady Elizabeth Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。1533年，53歳の時，フランスピカーディカレイスでの職業はlord deputy of calaisと記録されている。彼は1542年3月3日にイギリスロンドンで62歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックストウエル オフ ロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Arthur Plantagenet(이)가 1480년 프랑스 아키테인 도르도그니 캘레이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward IV King of England(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Wayte(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1511년 Lady Elizabeth Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1533년, 53세의 나이로 그의 직업은 프랑스 피카디 캘레이에서 lord deputy of calais이었다. 그는 1542년 3월 3일 영국 런던에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 타워 프 런던에 묻혔다.

mn.Kilkhampton, Cornwall-shire, England, Eu: Kylgh, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Arthur Plantagenet nasceu em 1480, em Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Edward IV King of England, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Wayte, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Grey aproximadamente 1511. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Em 1533, com 53 anos, sua profissão aparece como lord deputy of calais em Calais, Picardie, França. Ele faleceu em 3 de março de 1542, em London, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arthur Plantagenet родился в 1480 г. в местности калеи, дордогн, аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Edward IV King of England было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wayte, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Grey около 1511 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. В 1533 году, в возрасте 53 лет,  он работал по профессии lord deputy of calais в местности калеи, пикарди, Франция. Он умер 3 марта 1542 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Arthur Plantagenet nació en 1480, en Calais, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Edward IV King of England, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Wayte, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Grey aproximadamente 1511. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. En 1533, a la edad de 53 años, su ocupación registrada era lord deputy of calais en Calais, Picardie, Francia. Murió el 3 de marzo de 1542, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
